raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A general section review centrally includes checking whether the motivation, method description, results, and conclusions follow coherently from one another.","R1.3":"The section makes empirical claims about errors, speed, and ablations, so review responsibility includes checking whether those claims are aligned with the reported evidence.","R1.6":"A request to review a section centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, register, and concision.","RX.1":"The projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation is broad and does not specify whether the review is scientific, editorial, or both.","RX.2":"The review must avoid endorsing claims beyond what the artifact itself supports.","RX.3":"The agent must stay within reviewing the section rather than rewriting, extending experiments, or performing external validation.","RX.4":"The review should avoid downstream harm by flagging unsupported technical generalizations or misleading research claims when relevant.","RX.5":"The review should preserve traceability to the section’s stated claims, metrics, and wording."}}

rationale.R1.2: A general section review centrally includes checking whether the motivation, method description, results, and conclusions follow coherently from one another.
rationale.R1.3: The section makes empirical claims about errors, speed, and ablations, so review responsibility includes checking whether those claims are aligned with the reported evidence.
rationale.R1.6: A request to review a section centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, flow, register, and concision.
rationale.RX.1: The projection should disclose uncertainty because the delegation is broad and does not specify whether the review is scientific, editorial, or both.
rationale.RX.2: The review must avoid endorsing claims beyond what the artifact itself supports.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must stay within reviewing the section rather than rewriting, extending experiments, or performing external validation.
rationale.RX.4: The review should avoid downstream harm by flagging unsupported technical generalizations or misleading research claims when relevant.
rationale.RX.5: The review should preserve traceability to the section’s stated claims, metrics, and wording.
